caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back, wearing a light-colored, long-sleeved button-down shirt, sits at a desk in a brightly lit indoor setting. She is positioned in profile, facing a computer monitor and a black keyboard. The monitor displays a light grey interface with a central graphic of a three-dimensional object. As the sequence progresses, the object on the screen changes color, transitioning from a dark grey in the first instance to a vibrant blue in the subsequent frames. The woman remains still, observing the screen with her right arm extended toward the desk. The background consists of a plain white wall with a vertical shelving track. No legible text or logos are visible on the screen or surrounding equipment.
